name: roadmapsmith
description: Living evidence-backed roadmap tool with two commands: init and update.

install.notes: Recommended Claude Code install path for native GUI slash commands. Canonical surfaces: /roadmap-init, /roadmap-update. Use /roadmap-init to create ROADMAP.md and AGENTS.md; use /roadmap-update to refresh the roadmap, add tasks, record evidence, or check northStar drift. Install the roadmapsmith CLI separately for actual command execution. Then run /reload-skills and, if applicable, /reload-plugins. Codex native plugin installs use the repo/package .codex-plugin surface instead of this Claude-specific skills CLI path.

skills.name: roadmap-init
skills.description: Initialize ROADMAP.md, AGENTS.md, and host integration files for a project.

skills.name: roadmap-update
skills.description: Refresh ROADMAP.md with evidence-backed validation, add tasks, or record evidence.
